# Debt Validation Letter -- Free Template & Guide [2026]
> Send a debt validation letter within 30 days to force collectors to prove you owe. Free template, FDCPA rules, and next steps. 2026 guide.

## About
debtvalidationletter.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- The 30-Day Validation Window -- When to Send Your Dispute Letter -- Debt Validation: https://debtvalidationletter.org/30-day-window.html
- After You Send a Debt Validation Letter -- Next Steps: https://debtvalidationletter.org/after-validation.html
- Free Cease and Desist Letter to Debt Collector Template (2026) -- Debt Validation: https://debtvalidationletter.org/cease-desist-template.html
- Common Mistakes with Debt Validation Letters: https://debtvalidationletter.org/common-mistakes.html
- Debt Collector Rights [2026] -- What Collectors Can and Cannot Do Under the FDCPA -- Debt Validation: https://debtvalidationletter.org/debt-collector-rights.html
- Free Debt Validation Letter Template (2026) -- 30-Day FDCPA Request: https://debtvalidationletter.org/debt-validation-template.html
- Debt Validation Letter FAQ -- Frequently Asked Questions: https://debtvalidationletter.org/faq.html
- Your Rights Under FDCPA Section 809 -- Debt Validation: https://debtvalidationletter.org/fdcpa-rights.html
- Debt Validation Letter -- Free Template & Guide: https://debtvalidationletter.org/
- When Debt Cannot Be Validated -- Your Options -- Debt Validation: https://debtvalidationletter.org/invalid-debt.html
- Free Debt Settlement Letter Template (2026) -- Negotiate a Lump Sum -- Debt Validation: https://debtvalidationletter.org/settlement-letter-template.html
- Free Debt Validation Letter Template -- Copy and Send: https://debtvalidationletter.org/template.html
- What Debt Collectors Must Prove -- Validation Requirements -- Debt Validation: https://debtvalidationletter.org/what-collectors-must-prove.html
- Debt Validation Letter Template -- Free Sample to Copy & Send: https://debtvalidationletter.org/sample-debt-validation-letter.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
